items.Item: Constitución Política de Colombia
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Constitutional rights relevant to data protection, free enterprise, due process. Cited rarely but foundational.

items.Item: Código Civil (selected articles)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Underlies every contract: obligations, contracts, persons, agency.

items.Item: Código de Comercio
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Governs commercial activity, companies, commercial obligations. Foundation for SAS framework.

items.Item: Código Sustantivo del Trabajo
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Foundation for the Contrato de Trabajo Investment-Ready.

items.Item: Estatuto Tributario
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Tax treatment of contracts, withholdings, parafiscales, equity events.

items.Item: Código General del Proceso (CGP)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Procedural rules referenced in dispute resolution clauses.

items.Item: Ley 1258 de 2008 (SAS)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Foundation for shareholders agreement and SAS-specific governance.
items.Notes: Most cited statute for the platform

items.Item: Ley 222 de 1995 (modifies Código de Comercio)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Corporate fundamentals across all five documents.

items.Item: Ley 50 de 1990 (labor reform)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Contrato de Trabajo legal grounding.

items.Item: Ley 789 de 2002 (labor reform)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Contrato de Trabajo + parafiscales reform.

items.Item: Ley 1429 de 2010 (formalización)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Contrato de Trabajo and SAS context.

items.Item: Ley 23 de 1982 (Derecho de Autor)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Critical for Cesión de Propiedad Intelectual.

items.Item: Decisión Andina 351 (CAN, PI)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Critical for Cesión de Propiedad Intelectual and cross-border IP context.

items.Item: Decisión Andina 486 (propiedad industrial)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Trademark and patent considerations in IP assignment.

items.Item: Ley 1581 de 2012 (Habeas Data)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Data treatment across NDA, IP assignment, employment, shareholders agreement.

items.Item: Decreto 1377 de 2013 (Habeas Data reglamento)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Data treatment procedural framework.

items.Item: Ley 1116 de 2006 (insolvencia)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Insolvency risk assessment in DD.

items.Item: Ley 1314 de 2009 (NIIF / contabilidad)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Financial statement standards for DD review.

items.Item: Ley 1340 de 2009 (libre competencia)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Antitrust in DD for sale or merger scenarios.

items.Item: Ley 1474 de 2011 (Estatuto Anti-Corrupción)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Anti-corruption diligence.

items.Item: Ley 1762 de 2015 (anti-contrabando / lavado)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Anti-money laundering DD aspects.

items.Item: DUR financiero (Decreto 2555 de 2010)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Financial sector regulation, relevant for fintech targets.

items.Item: Recent jurisprudence on non-competition compensation
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Critical for the non-compete clause in the Contrato de Trabajo Investment-Ready.

items.Item: Conceptos jurídicos · Superintendencia de Sociedades
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Interpretations on SAS governance, board duties, corporate decisions. Critical for shareholders agreement variants.

items.Item: Circulares externas · SuperSociedades (corporate governance)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Governance compliance requirements.

items.Item: Resoluciones · SuperSociedades on related-party transactions
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Common DD findings on conflict of interest.

items.Item: Circular Básica Jurídica · SuperFinanciera
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Fintech sector reference, banking touchpoints in DD.

items.Item: Circular Básica Contable y Financiera · SuperFinanciera
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Financial statement standards for DD.

items.Item: Resoluciones · SIC on Habeas Data
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Data treatment compliance for NDA and IP assignment clauses.

items.Item: Conceptos · SIC on Registro Nacional de Bases de Datos
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Compliance reference for companies being raised.

items.Item: SIC trademark guidelines and Niza classification
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for IP assignment scope.

items.Item: Decisiones SIC en antitrust (selected)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: DD risk assessment for targets with antitrust exposure.

items.Item: Conceptos tributarios DIAN on equity instruments
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Tax treatment of vesting, SAFE, convertible notes for diligence.

items.Item: DIAN resoluciones on facturación electrónica
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Compliance reference for SMB customer base.

items.Item: Conceptos del Ministerio del Trabajo on Contrato de Trabajo distinctions
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Critical for employment contract drafting.

items.Item: Decretos sobre prima, cesantías, intereses (current)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Current rates and obligations for employment contracts.

items.Item: Decreto 1072 de 2015 (DUR Sector Trabajo)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Comprehensive labor reference.

items.Item: Cámara de Comercio Bogotá · procedures and forms
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for governance and shareholders' agreement filings if applicable.

items.Item: Corte Constitucional · habeas data y privacidad
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Data treatment standards across all five documents.

items.Item: Corte Constitucional · libertad económica y flexibilidad laboral
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Non-compete and exclusivity clauses in employment.
items.Notes: Required for Contrato de Trabajo non-compete clause

items.Item: Corte Constitucional · sentencias relevantes a tutelas laborales
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Risk awareness in employment clause design.

items.Item: CSJ Sala Civil · interpretación contractual
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Foundation for clause interpretation across all five documents.

items.Item: CSJ Sala Civil · responsabilidad precontractual
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Scope of NDA and pre-investment conversation protections.

items.Item: CSJ Sala Laboral · reclasificación de contratistas independientes
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Critical risk awareness embedded in employment vs contractor distinction.

items.Item: CSJ Sala Laboral · no competencia con compensación
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: CRITICAL · directly informs the non-compete language in Contrato de Trabajo Investment-Ready.

items.Item: Consejo de Estado · decisions on regulated sectors
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: DD context for regulated-sector targets.

items.Item: Tribunales Arbitrales · CAC Cámara Comercio Bogotá awards (public)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Default arbitration forum referenced in dispute resolution clauses.

items.Item: CCI awards involving Colombian parties (cross-border)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: DD cross-border context.

items.Item: FIVE DOCS · Acuerdo de Accionistas · master template
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Master template for the platform's most complex document. Includes drag-along, tag-along, qualified majorities, anti-dilution principles, governance.

items.Item: FIVE DOCS · Vesting de Fundadores · master template
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Vesting agreement with cliff, acceleration provisions, treatment on departure.
items.Notes: Build with both single-trigger and double-trigger variants

items.Item: FIVE DOCS · Cesión de Propiedad Intelectual · master template
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: IP assignment with variants for founders, employees, and contractors.
items.Notes: Distinct legal grounding per contributor type

items.Item: FIVE DOCS · Contrato de Trabajo Investment-Ready · master template
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Employment contract with comprehensive IP assignment, confidentiality, non-compete folded in.
items.Notes: Non-compete clause requires recent jurisprudence grounding

items.Item: FIVE DOCS · Acuerdo de Confidencialidad mutuo · master template
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Mutual NDA with unilateral variant. Simplest of the five.

items.Item: Clause library · Acuerdo de Accionistas variants
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Each clause with all variants the firm uses, conditions of inclusion, explanatory notes.
items.Notes: Largest clause library of the five

items.Item: Clause library · Vesting de Fundadores variants
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Vesting schedule variants, acceleration variants, treatment-on-departure variants.

items.Item: Clause library · Cesión de PI variants
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Founder vs employee vs contractor variants. Prior-creations carve-outs.

items.Item: Clause library · Contrato de Trabajo Investment-Ready variants
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: IP, confidentiality, non-compete, non-solicit variants per role and seniority.

items.Item: Clause library · NDA variants
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Mutual vs unilateral, plus protection-period variants.

items.Item: Past shareholders agreements (last 3 years, redacted)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Baseline patterns for the master template.

items.Item: Past vesting agreements (last 3 years, redacted)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Baseline patterns.

items.Item: Past IP assignments (last 3 years, redacted)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Baseline patterns. Employee, contractor, founder versions.

items.Item: Past Contratos de Trabajo with investor-grade clauses (redacted)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Baseline patterns.

items.Item: Past NDAs (mutual and unilateral, redacted)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Baseline patterns.

items.Item: Memos on drag-along thresholds in Colombian VC
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Firm position on drag-along thresholds for clause notes.

items.Item: Memos on non-compete enforceability and compensation
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Firm position on enforceable non-compete language.

items.Item: Memos on IP assignment scope and moral rights
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Firm position on Colombian moral rights treatment.

items.Item: Negotiation playbook for shareholders agreements with investors
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Patterns of what investors push for and how the firm responds.

items.Item: Standard DD scope and checklist used by the firm
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Powers target upload taxonomy and firm review structure.

items.Item: Past DD reports (redacted, with client permission)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Patterns of findings and language for DD AI training.
items.Notes: Requires client permission for redacted use

items.Item: Risk taxonomy for Colombian DD findings
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Findings categorization in the investor view (registral, laboral, etc.).

items.Item: Cap table maintenance procedures
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for keeping the cap table clean as the company adds investors.
items.Notes: Linked to shareholders agreement and vesting

items.Item: RUT activation and changes
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for tax registration touches in DD.

items.Item: Firma electrónica options and process
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Out-of-platform signature workflow reference.
items.Notes: Electronic signature integration is out of scope for MVP

items.Item: EPS, Pensión, ARL, Caja affiliation procedures
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for due diligence on employment formalization.

items.Item: Planilla Integrada de Liquidación de Aportes (PILA)
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for DD on recurring labor obligations.

items.Item: SIC RNBD (Registro Nacional de Bases de Datos) procedure
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference for habeas data compliance in DD.

items.Item: Standard data treatment policy template
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Reference template generated when DD identifies data treatment gaps.

items.Item: Drafting assistant prompt · investment-readiness focus
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Inline help in document drafting flow. Tuned for founder/SMB audience and the five document focus.

items.Item: Structured intake summarization prompt
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Generates the lawyer's executive summary from intake form for review preparation.

items.Item: Knowledge hub query prompt
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Public-facing Q&A grounded in published articles and indexed Colombian regulation.

items.Item: DD finding extraction prompt
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Extracts findings from data room documents with Colombian regulatory context.

items.Item: Review preparation prompt
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Compares customer draft against master template, highlights deviations.

items.Item: Refusal prompt · legal advice boundary
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Used when the AI must decline to give legal advice.

items.Item: Guardrail · no specific legal advice on customer situation
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Validation rule for outputs.

items.Item: Guardrail · no prediction of legal outcomes
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Validation rule.

items.Item: Guardrail · no reference to laws or cases that do not exist
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Hallucination check.

items.Item: Guardrail · no contradiction with customer input
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Quality check.

items.Item: Guardrail · mandatory disclaimer on every AI response
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Professional responsibility requirement.

items.Item: Glossary of 150-200 key legal terms in plain Spanish
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Consistent terminology across the platform.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Inline expansion on first use.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Appears below every AI-generated answer.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Before download of any generated document.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: On every DD report and finding.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Throughout platform terms and UI.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Firm user acknowledgment before access.

items.Item: Review request intake · Acuerdo de Accionistas
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Fields capturing accionistas, distribution of capital, threshold decisions made, investor on the table, flagged sections (~25 fields).

items.Item: Review request intake · Vesting de Fundadores
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Fields capturing founder identities, equity already granted, vesting schedule chosen, acceleration choice, recent founder changes (~15 fields).

items.Item: Review request intake · Cesión de PI
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Fields capturing contributor type, scope of IP, prior creations, current role at company, special carve-outs (~15 fields).

items.Item: Review request intake · Contrato de Trabajo Investment-Ready
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Fields capturing role, salary, IP scope, non-compete period chosen, special circumstances (~18 fields).

items.Item: Review request intake · NDA mutuo
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Fields capturing parties, purpose, term, scope of confidential information (~8 fields).

items.Item: Help request intake · generic mid-flow
items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Field flagged, restated question, urgency, preferred response method.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Company basics, deal type, requesting investor, scope of DD.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Investor identification, syndicate composition, access scope.

items.Description / Why the AI needs it: Document description, urgency, relationship to existing findings.
